summary: Comprehensive testing completed for new AyurCare Hospital Management System features. Backend APIs 100% functional for all new features (Financial Reports, HR Management, Expense Tracking). Frontend HR module fully functional with successful staff management and salary payment workflows. Minor authentication persistence issue identified for direct navigation to Reports page.

integration_issues.issue: Authentication session not persisting when navigating directly to /reports URL
integration_issues.note: User gets redirected to login page when accessing /reports directly, but HR page works fine after login

passed_tests: HR Page Loading and Data Display
Add Staff Functionality (Form submission and data persistence)
Staff List Display with Salary Information
Record Salary Payment (Form submission and calculation)
Real-time Data Updates (Staff count, salary totals)
Financial Report Data Structure (IP/OP counts, revenue breakdown, profit/loss)
All CRUD Operations for Staff and Salary Management
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication persistence issue for direct navigation to Reports page. The AuthContext may need to handle route-based authentication checks more robustly.
